calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-04-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: L. Perez.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bank of the West.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, and considering of the declaration by Plaintiff's Witness Ernest Knowles, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Razor Enterprises Inc. as follows:
Principal $67,347.64
Prejudgment Interest $3,191.85
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $385.00, for the Total of $73,424.49
Plaintiff's is also entitled to its immediate possession of the leasd quipment(s) described in the Jugment.
Judgment signed in open court.
